sources.note: 40 Black Rock City pins from cpnPins

excludedSources.reason: StreetLines.geojson contains 599 LineString features, but the current cartridge client renders points and polygon fills only.
amplitude.geojson is for a separate event and is outside Black Rock City.
Prototype/demo users, messages, and sample pins are not event-source data.
